signs_description: Sisize sibeke lezi Zimpawu ze-Bitcoin kulo lonke i-America!
signs_choose_header: SIYABONGA NGOKUSISIZA UKUBEKA LEZI ZIMPAWU ZE-BITCOIN KULO LONKE I-AMERICA!
signs_choose_c1: Manje sesiphelile ngezimpawu! Umgomo wethu ukusheshisa ukwamukelwa kwe-Bitcoin ngemfundo.
signs_choose_c2: Abaningi benu basize ngokubeka lezi zimpawu ze-Bitcoin zamahhala emphakathini. Zonke izimpawu zethu zinamakhodi e-QR axhumana nekhasi lemfundo nge
signs_choose_c4: Ngokubonga umphakathi wethu omangalisayo, sifinyelele izinkulungwane zabantu futhi sabasiza bathathe izinyathelo zabo zokuqala emgodini we-Bitcoin.
signs_share_c1: Yabelana ngesithombe sendawo yesimpawu sakho nathi ku-Nostr futhi ubone ukuthi abanye abantu babeka kuphi izimpawu zabo.
signs_instructions_1: Faka ikheli lakho lokuthumela bese sithumela ibhokisi lezimpawu ze-Bitcoin ezingu-10 ngeposi!
signs_instructions_2: Idatha yekheli iyasuswa ngemuva kokuthumela izimpawu zakho zamahhala.
